contact.description: Get in touch with me. The best way to reach me is by email.
contact.intro: Feel free to reach out. The best way to get in touch is by email.

search.prompt: Search for articles by title or description.

readingList.empty: Your reading list is empty. Save articles to read them later.

downloadGate.title: You are leaving this site
downloadGate.description: You are being redirected to an external download link.

invalidUrl.title: Invalid URL
invalidUrl.description: The download link is invalid or has been tampered with.

promptGenerator.title: AI Content Prompt Generator
promptGenerator.description: Use this form to generate a structured prompt for requesting new content. Fill in the details below, and the final prompt will be generated for you to copy.
promptGenerator.draftPlaceholder: Paste your full content draft here. To specify a download button location, use a placeholder like [DOWNLOAD_BUTTON_1], [DOWNLOAD_BUTTON_2], etc.

downloadLinks.title: Download Links (Optional)
downloadLinks.description: List the links for the placeholders you used in the draft. Use the format: Link Text | https://external-url.com
downloadLinks.placeholder:
Windows 11 ISO | https://example.com/win11.iso
Latest Rufus | https://rufus.ie/downloads/
downloadLinks.promptInstruction: Please replace the [DOWNLOAD_BUTTON_X] placeholders in the draft with <DownloadButton> components using the corresponding links below:

promptGenerator.imagesDescription: The first line is ALWAYS for the hero image, separated by a `|` for the alt text. Each subsequent line is for a supporting image.
promptGenerator.imagesPlaceholder:
/images/blank/blank.webp | A descriptive alt text for the hero image
/images/articles/supporting-1.webp | Alt text for the first supporting image
promptGenerator.imagesDescriptionNote: Insert path and alt text for images to be embedded within the note's content, one per line, separated by a `|`. Notes do not have a hero image.
promptGenerator.articleTitleDescription: An English title is recommended. For best SEO, aim for 50-60 characters. The URL slug will be generated from this. Leave blank for an AI-generated title.
promptGenerator.publishDateDescription: Feel free to use a flexible format like 'tomorrow' or 'next Monday'.
promptGenerator.tagsDescription: Leave blank if you want the AI to generate relevant tags.
promptGenerator.translationKeyDescription: A unique ID in Indonesian to link translated articles. MUST be the same for both versions.
promptGenerator.copySuccessDescription: Prompt is ready to be pasted in the chat.
promptGenerator.promptBaseBlog: Please create and publish a new blog article for me based on the following details.
promptGenerator.promptBaseNote: Please create and publish a new Note for me based on the following details.
promptGenerator.titlePlaceholder: Please create an SEO-friendly title based on the content.
promptGenerator.finalInstruction: Additional Instruction: The slug must be in English and kebab-case. After completion, always confirm the `translationKey` you used so I can find the files easily.
